title: Hot Wheels Infinite Rush
summary: Hot Wheels Infinte Rush is an upcoming 2026 racing game from the developers behind Hot Wheels Unleashed & Hot Wheels Unleashed 2: Turbocharged. Developed and published by Milestone S.r.l., the game is set to be released on 24 september 2026, for the Xbox Series X/S, PlayStation 5, Nintendo Switch 2 and Microsoft Windows.

title: Planet Micro
summary:
center|500px
500px|center
Planet Micro is a series of small scale (approximately 1:150 scale) Hot Wheels in the late 1990s. They came after the the Micro Hot Wheels and before the Atomix series. Planet Micro cars are actually smaller than the Micro Hot Wheels series from the late 80s/ early 90s with the punchline "Micro Size, Mega Detail!...

title: World's Smallest Hot Wheels
summary: 200px|rightWorld's Smallest Hot Wheels is a series of Hot Wheels-themed toys manufactured and marketed by Super Impulse as one of their many brands in their World's Smallest product line introduced in 2017. These are approximately 1:180 scale versions of Hot Wheels cars and tracksets; the wheels on the cars turn and the cars run on tracks. Each car is no larger than a quarter.

title: Jeremy Padawer
summary: Jeremy Michael Padawer (born October 26, 1973) was Marketing Manager for Hot Wheels from 2001 to 2003. He was hired by Mattel shortly after he completed college. His first pitch at the company was the K.I.T.

title: Micro Hot Wheels
summary: Micro Hot Wheels is a series of miniature Hot Wheel cars that came out in 1989 to compete with the newest phenomenon of diecast toys "Micro Machines". They are the first series for Hot Wheels to venture into making cars smaller than their usual 1:64 scale. After the series ended within a year (or two?...

title: Team Hot Wheels Top Rides Series (2012)
summary: The Team Hot Wheels Top Rides Series was released exclusively at Target stores in 2012. All castings in this series are all 2011 and 2012 mainline releases on a specially designed card by the picks of the four driver teams. Each vehicle comes with a sticker sheet consisting of the Team Hot Wheels logo and the team color icon.
